resolved_issues: The four target floors are explicit.
The eight-level deterministic ordering is explicit.
blocking_issues: The second-round prompt did not repeat the exact first-round findings, so closure could not be proven from supplied context.
run_llm_task needs a dedicated direct-call integration test for selection consistency and no-qualified-route failure.
residual_risks: Production route choices can change and require dry-run comparison.
Strict floors can temporarily leave no route.
Free-route availability still depends on current health and cooldown evidence.
